channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipped items, 21st April
item.description:
Car seat and nerf gun at the corner of Elmfield Avenue and Midwinter Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Midwinter Avenue, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree now leaning at a 30 degree angle and loose - it will fall in a high wind, 21st April
item.description:
Outside 30 Coberley Road. Tree is very loose in ground and is in danger of falling. The angle is getting worse and worse each month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Coberley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass in road, 21st April
item.description:
Broken glass in parking bay in front of John Dower House, Crescent Place. GL50 3PG
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Relentless Illegal Parking, 21st April
item.description:
Illegal Parking on the Pedestrian Area in front of David Lloyds Gym is becoming a serious problems with several large SUV's frequently parking/blocking this area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whittle Way, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep gouge on roundabout surface, 21st April
item.description:
Between the entrance to Elmbridge Court and the exit onto the roundabout from the A40 coming from C&G roundabout. There is a deep gouge in the middle of the roundabout which is a danger to motorcyclists. I’ve checked the Highways website and I can’t see any work scheduled for this part of the roundabout.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court Roundabout, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Closure barriers left on narrow road with no turning points, 21st April
item.description:
As per arrow on attached photo at this location (GL522JR) Columbia street is blocked with road closed signs with no work going on. People have to reverse up a narrow street when they meet the barriers caused risk to surroundings cars due to the narrow street. This has been ongoing for 4 days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Columbia Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Lots of pot holes coming off mini roundabouts on Church Road, 21st April
item.description:
A serious of pot holes that have been there for a long time - these are getting worse. A matter of emergency given to amount and size of them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Church Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot holes/multiple potholes where Grove Road meets Symphony road, 21st April
item.description:
Large pothole on the left kerbside as you head towards Cold Pool lane. Then as you pass Symphony Road two more large potholes on the right hand side of the road. Have to swerve to miss the left hand side pothole and then swerve again to avoid those on the right hand side. Hazardous for road users
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Symphony Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole at the junction coming off the roundabout, 21st April
item.description:
Left lane of Andover Road where it meets the junction to join the traffic at the roundabout of Texaco petrol station
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Way Marker Points Across to Wrong Field, 21st April
item.description:
Way Marker Points Across to Wrong Field. Needs an adjustment. Previous reports appear to have been deleted - with no action.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No proper Barrier to stop fall into water course, 21st April
item.description:
No proper Barrier to stop fall into water course
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gretton Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped items, 21st April
item.description:
Large suitcases at the end of Malthouse Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1 Woodbine Cottage, Malthouse Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 21st April
item.description:
Road closure STW works. They are entering from both directions and going around signs despite the closure in place. Police have been notified and have contacted Severn Trent. Cars still entering onto the road by going over pavement.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep problem. Danger to cyclists, 21st April
item.description:
In the road for traffic heading up the hill (south-west). Very dangerous for cyclists
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Bayshill Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
